apple.name: Apple

typography.family: SF Pro Display (display) / SF Pro Text (body)
typography.signature: Negative letter-spacing on display sizes (-0.28 to -0.374px); body at 17px not 16px; weight 600 for headlines

apple.principles: Photography-first museum gallery. UI chrome recedes so the product speaks. Alternating full-bleed light/dark tiles as the structural rhythm. Single blue accent for all interaction.
apple.cards: Product tiles are edge-to-edge full-bleed (no rounding). Store utility cards at rounded.lg (18px) with hairline border. Configurator chips at rounded.pill. No shadows on chrome — only on product renders.
apple.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded.pill = 9999px). Primary: blue (#0066cc) bg, white text. Secondary: clear with blue border. Dark utility: ink bg (#1d1d1f). Active state: transform: scale(0.95) site-wide.
apple.inputs: Search input at rounded.pill, height 44px, 12px/20px padding, 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.08) border.
apple.animation: No documented animation philosophy beyond the scale(0.95) press micro-interaction. Backdrop-filter blur on sticky bars for depth.
apple.uniqueness: Exactly one drop-shadow in the entire system (on product renders). Edge-to-edge alternating tiles as section dividers (no borders). SF Pro proprietary negative tracking. 17px body as brand pace.

raycast.name: Raycast

colors.accent: #ffffff (white pill — the only primary CTA color)

typography.family: Inter (with ss03 stylistic set enabled site-wide)
typography.signature: ss03 alternate 'g' glyph is the brand's typographic identity. Positive letter-spacing (0.1-0.4px) for airy feel. 1.6 line-height for body.

raycast.principles: The marketing page IS the product. Chrome = command-palette UI at marketing scale. Continuous dark mode. Elevation from surface ladder, not shadows.
raycast.cards: Hairline-bordered (1px #242728) cards on dark surfaces. Radius 6-10px for feature cards, 16px for hero mockups. No drop shadows anywhere.
raycast.buttons: Rounded.md (8px). Primary: white (#ffffff) bg, black text. Secondary: transparent, white text. Tertiary: surface-elevated (#101111) bg, white text. Install button: transparent with hairline-strong border.
raycast.inputs: Text input bg #101111, 1px #242728 border, height 36px, rounded 8px. Focus = border brightens to hairline-strong. Store search: 44px height.
raycast.animation: No drop shadows. Red diagonal-stripe gradient band (hero-stripe-start → hero-stripe-end) as the only decorative animation-like moment. One-band-per-page maximum.
raycast.uniqueness: Entirely dark mode. White pill as the only primary CTA. ss03 Inter glyph as brand signature. Command-palette mockups as the hero element. No drop shadows — surface-color ladder creates elevation. Red gradient hero band used once per page.

ferrari.name: Ferrari

typography.signature: Display weight never exceeds 500. CTA labels uppercase with 1.4px tracking. Nav links uppercase with 0.65px tracking. Negative letter-spacing on display only.

ferrari.principles: Cinematic editorial — luxury magazine, not car OEM. Full-bleed photographic heroes. Single red accent used scarcely. Sharp corners = precision.
ferrari.cards: Sharp 0px corners on every card and CTA. Feature cards photo-led, edge-to-edge imagery. Driver cards at #303030 with 0px radius. Preowned listing cards white at #ffffff 0px radius with 24px padding.
ferrari.buttons: Sharp 0px (rounded.none) corners — NEVER pills. Primary: Rosso Corsa bg, white text, 14px/700 uppercase. Outline: transparent with 1px white border. Height 48px, padding 14px/32px.
ferrari.inputs: Text input on dark: bg #181818, 1px #303030 border, rounded 4px, height 48px, 14px/16px padding.
ferrari.animation: Photographic depth + brightness-step elevation. No drop shadow tiers. Hero parallax implied (not documented). Brand red gradient used in accent bands.
ferrari.uniqueness: Rosso Corsa as the single brand voltage. Sharp 0px CTAs (anti-pill). FerrariSans never bold at display size. 8px spacing ladder up to 128px 'super'. Hypersail yellow is sub-brand scoped. Full-bleed cinematic photography as primary depth device.

figma.name: Figma
figma.canvas_polarity: monochrome (white/black) with oversized pastel color blocks

typography.signature: Aggressive negative tracking (-1.72px at 86px). Mono uppercase for taxonomy. Weight carries hierarchy, not size. Tight line-heights on display (1.0-1.1), generous on body (1.4-1.45).

figma.principles: Monochrome chrome makes the pastel color blocks feel intentional. Contrast-driven: editorial black-and-white frame interrupted by saturated pastel panels. Pill is the only button shape.
figma.cards: Pricing cards at rounded.lg (24px) with hairline border. Color-block sections at rounded.lg (24px) spanning full content width. Template cards at rounded.md (8px) on surface-soft. Feature illustration tiles at rounded.md.
figma.buttons: Pill (rounded.pill = 50px) is the ONLY button shape — no square buttons. Primary: black bg, white text. Secondary: white bg, black text. Magenta promo: #ff3d8b for rare promotional CTAs. Icon buttons: circular (rounded.full) 40px.
figma.inputs: Text input at rounded.md (8px), 12px/14px padding, hairline border. Focus via ring, not fill change.
figma.animation: No gradients or shadows — color blocks do the depth work. Marquee strip (customer logos) scrolls. Color-block reveal animations present but not formally documented.
figma.uniqueness: Pastel color-block sections as the narrative device — lime, lilac, cream, mint, pink, coral, navy. Black is the primary brand color (not blue/red). figmaSans at ultra-fine variable weights (320-340). Mono uppercase for taxonomy only. Pill-only button vocabulary. Single-shot magenta promo accent.

intercom.name: Intercom

colors.accent_secondary: #ff5600 (Fin Orange — AI product color, not generic primary)

typography.signature: Negative tracking proportional to size (-2px at 72px down to 0 on body). Tight display leading (1.05), generous body leading (1.5). Sentence-case eyebrows (no all-caps).

intercom.principles: Editorial, calm, product-focused. Cream canvas warmth as brand signal. Product screenshots as protagonists. Saans at weight 500 for confident-but-quiet display.
intercom.cards: Floating white (surface-1) cards on cream canvas. 12px (lg) radius for pricing/feature cards, 16px (xl) for product mockups. No drop shadows — white-on-cream surface change IS the depth.
intercom.buttons: Rounded.md (8px) — NOT pills. Primary: charcoal (#111111) bg, white text. Secondary: white bg, charcoal text. Fin Orange (#ff5600) reserved for Fin AI CTAs only. Height ~40px, padding 10px/18px.
intercom.inputs: Text input bg #ffffff, 1px #d3cec6 border, rounded 8px, 10px/14px padding, height ~44px.
intercom.animation: Resists drop shadows. Cream + white surface change supplies depth. Product UI mockups are the decoration.
intercom.uniqueness: Cream canvas (#f5f1ec) as the anchor surface — never white. Charcoal (#111111) as system primary (not a color). Fin Orange scoped to AI product only. Saans proprietary geometric sans. Report palette exists only inside product mockups. No pill CTAs.

notion.name: Notion
notion.canvas_polarity: white with deep navy hero and pastel tinted feature sections

typography.signature: Tight hero leading (1.05) on 80px display. Negative letter-spacing on display (-2px to -0.5px). Generous body leading (1.55). 600 for headlines, 500 for buttons.

notion.principles: All-in-one workspace voice. Illustration-rich with sticky-note dots and mesh wire decorations. Centered hero layout (unusual for B2B SaaS). Pastel feature cards echo product database properties.
notion.cards: Rounded.lg (12px) for all cards with 1px hairline border. Pastel-tinted feature cards (peach, rose, mint, lavender, sky, yellow, yellow-bold). Deep drop shadow on hero workspace mockup (level 3: rgba(15,15,15,0.2) 0px 24px 48px -8px).
notion.buttons: Rounded.md (8px) rectangles — NOT pills. Primary: purple (#5645d4). Secondary: transparent with hairline-strong border. Dark variant: black bg. On-dark: white bg. 10px/18px padding, ~40px height.
notion.inputs: Text input bg #ffffff, 1px #c8c4be border, rounded 8px, 12px/16px padding, height 44px. Focus: 2px solid #5645d4 (purple ring).
notion.animation: 150-200ms ease recommended for transitions. Pastel cards carry visual weight via tint. Workspace mockup has deep diffuse shadow against navy band.
notion.uniqueness: Notion Purple (#5645d4) as signature CTA color. 8px rectangular buttons (anti-pill). Pastel tint palette echoing in-product DB properties. Deep navy hero with decorative sticky-note dots. Yellow-bold (#f9e79f) for high-emphasis banners. Centered hero layout. 4-tier pricing with purple-bordered featured tier.

uber.name: Uber

typography.signature: Two faces, two roles — never crossed. Sentence-case headlines (no all-caps). No tracking variation (neither positive nor negative). 700 for headlines, 500 for buttons.

uber.principles: Transportation super-app signaled through restraint. Black-and-white duet with no third color. Pill is the single signature shape. Editorial 4:3 illustrations are the only decoration.
uber.cards: Rounded.xl (16px) for all cards — promo cards, content cards, ride-request form. Polarized black/white bands: light card → black promo → light card → black footer. 24px padding standard.
uber.buttons: Pill (rounded.pill = 999px) on EVERY interactive element. Primary: black (#000000) bg, white text. Secondary: white bg, black text. Subtle: gray (#efefef) bg. Floating: white with subtle shadow. Only exception: button-large-rounded at rounded.xl (16px) inside ride-request form.
uber.inputs: Text input bg #efefef (canvas-soft), rounded 8px, 16px padding. Nested variant at #f3f3f3 (canvas-softer). Ride-request form: stacked inputs inside shadowed card.
uber.animation: Black bands as polarity-flip depth (no CSS shadows needed). Editorial illustrations provide visual weight. No decorative animations documented.
uber.uniqueness: Genuinely two-color system (black + white). Pill on every interactive element. Zero secondary accent colors. Two face families with strict role separation. Sentence-case always. Ride-request form card on hero is signature component. Polarity-flipped black bands mid-page.

nvidia.name: NVIDIA
nvidia.canvas_polarity: dark hero/footer chapters alternating with white body canvas

typography.signature: Extreme typographic restraint — no italic, no display variant, no monospace. Hierarchy from weight (400 vs 700) and size, never color. 2px radius on everything.

nvidia.principles: Engineering documentation that learned graphic design. Aggressively angular (2px max radius). Single green accent on everything interactive. Two-mode surface architecture (dark chapters, white body).
nvidia.cards: 2px radius (rounded.sm) on ALL cards and interactive elements. 1px #cccccc hairline border, NO shadows. 24-32px padding. Corner-square (12px solid green) as brand ornament.
nvidia.buttons: 2px radius (rounded.sm) — NO pills. Primary: green (#76b900) bg, black text. Outline: transparent with green border. Ghost: inline green text link. All at weight 700, 44px height.
nvidia.inputs: Text input bg #ffffff, 1px #cccccc border, rounded 2px, height 44px, 12px/16px padding. Focus: 2px green (#76b900) border.
nvidia.animation: No drop shadows except 5px ambient on sticky chrome bars. Photography + 3D renders supply depth. Corner-square is the only ornamental device.
nvidia.uniqueness: NVIDIA Green (#76b900) on everything interactive. 2px radius is the max (near-angular). Single decorative element: 12px green corner square on cards. Two-mode surface (dark frame, white body). 12-tier type hierarchy with only 400 + 700 weights. No pill buttons. Hairline borders replace shadows entirely.

shopify.name: Shopify
shopify.canvas_polarity: two parallel tracks: cinematic black (#000000) + light cream (#fbfbf5)

typography.family: Neue Haas Grotesk Display (display, thin 330) / Inter Variable (body, 420-550)
typography.signature: Thin-weight (330) display typography at 96px is the brand's loudest visual. Positive tracking on 96px (2.4px). ss03 stylistic set enabled globally. Display in NHGD, body in Inter.

shopify.principles: Two parallel design tracks (cinematic + transactional) sharing typographic DNA and pill button vocabulary but diverging in canvas polarity. Photography as editorial spread.
shopify.cards: Cinematic track: dark cards (#0a0a0a) with subtle inset top-highlight. Light track: white cards with 4 stacked tiny drop shadows (Level 3 — soft paper halo). Pricing cards at rounded.lg (12px). Photo frames at rounded.xl (20px). 32px padding.
shopify.buttons: Pill (rounded.pill = 9999px) is the ONLY button shape. Primary: black bg, white text. Outline-on-dark: transparent with 2px white border. Aloe pill: #c1fbd4 bg, black text (featured pricing). All at 12px/24px padding.
shopify.inputs: Text input bg #ffffff, 1px #e4e4e7 border, rounded 8px, 10px/12px padding.
shopify.animation: Stacked tiny shadows (Level 3) on light-track cards produce soft paper halo. Cinematic track: flat blackness with inset top-edge sheen. Photography as depth.
shopify.uniqueness: Two completely separate canvas tracks (black cinematic + cream transactional) that never blend. 96px display at weight 330 (extremely thin). Aloe/pistachio greens reserved for light track only. ss03 stylistic set global. Three type families (NHGD + Inter + mono). Stacked tiny-shadow card elevation. Pill-only button vocabulary across both tracks.

coinbase.name: Coinbase
coinbase.canvas_polarity: white with soft gray elevation bands and dark editorial heroes

typography.signature: Display at weight 400 signals 'calm institutional brand' not 'trading urgency'. Negative letter-spacing on display only (-1 to -2px). CoinbaseMono on every numerical value.

coinbase.principles: Institutional-grade crypto exchange presented as quiet financial brand. Single blue accent. Editorial pill geometry. Full-bleed dark heroes with layered product-UI mockups as signature component.
coinbase.cards: Rounded.xl (24px) for feature cards, product-UI mockups, pricing tiers. Dark hero contains layered product-ui-card-dark (#16181c) cards at slight rotation. Hairline-bordered white cards on light surfaces.
coinbase.buttons: Pill (rounded.pill = 100px) on every CTA. Primary: Coinbase Blue (#0052ff) bg, white text. Secondary-light: #eef0f3 bg, ink text. Secondary-dark: #16181c bg, white text. Outline-on-dark: transparent with white border. Pill-cta: 56px height for hero ('Get started'). All 16px/600 weight.
coinbase.inputs: Text input bg #ffffff, 1px #dee1e6 border, rounded 12px, height 48px, 14px/16px padding. Search pill: #eef0f3 bg, rounded.pill, 44px height.
coinbase.animation: Layered product-UI cards inside dark heroes at subtle rotation. No decorative drop shadows. Card-on-card layering supplies depth. One shadow tier only (0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)).
coinbase.uniqueness: Coinbase Blue (#0052ff) as single brand voltage. Display weight 400 (not 700 — deliberately calm). CoinbaseMono on every number. Full-bleed dark heroes with layered product-UI mockup cards. Pill geometry on everything interactive (100px). Trading green/red semantic colors text-only (never backgrounds). Dark hero surface equals ink color (#0a0b0d).
